center.name: Ernst Hartert
center.summary: Ernst Hartert是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联18种鸟类，包括达尔文拟䳍、Papuan mountain pigeon、斑胸䴉等18种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Cherrie's antwren (Myrmotherula cherriei) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Brazil, Colombia, Peru, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Orinoco softtail (Thripophaga cherriei) is a Vulnerable species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Colombia and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Papuan mountain pigeon (Gymnophaps albertisii) is a species of bird in the pigeon family, Columbidae

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The sentinel lark (Corypha athi) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in Kenya and Tanzania

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The slaty robin (Melanodryas cyanus), also known as the blue-grey robin, is a species of bird in the Australasian robin family Petroicidae

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The smoky robin (Melanodryas cryptoleuca) is a species of bird in the Australasian robin family Petroicidae endemic to West Papua, Indonesia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Sulawesi thrush (Turdus turdoides) is a species of passerine bird in the thrush family, Turdidae. It is endemic to the island of Sulawesi in Indonesia, where it inhabits evergreen montane forests at altitudes of

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Uluguru mountain greenbul (Arizelocichla neumanni), formerly sometimes known as the Uluguru greenbul, is a species of the bulbul family of passerine birds. It is found in eastern Tanzania

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Iraq babbler (Argya altirostris) is a species of bird in the family Leiothrichidae, native to reed beds of the Tigris-Euphrates Valley

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Papuan parrotfinch (Erythrura papuana) is a common species of estrildid finch found in New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The spot-breasted ibis (Bostrychia rara) is a small, forest-dwelling ibis found in African lowland forests and swampy forested areas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The grey-banded mannikin (Lonchura vana), or grey-banded munia, is a species of estrildid finch known to be found in Anggi Gigi, Tamrau Mountains, and Arfak Mountains in the Vogelkop Peninsula in north-western Papua, Indonesia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-collared oliveback (Nesocharis ansorgei) is a species of estrildid finch found in Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The green-backed twinspot or green twinspot (Mandingoa nitidula) is an estrildid finch found in many parts of Sub-Saharan Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Paradoxornis bakeri |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22735612A264210558 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22735612A264210558.en |access-date=12 June 2025}} | genus = Paradoxornis | species = bakeri | authority = (Hartert, 1900) | synonyms = * Psittiparus bakeri }} The rufous-headed parrotbill (Paradoxornis bakeri), or greater rufous-headed parrotbill, is a parrotbill in the family Paradoxornithidae and is found in eastern Asia from the eastern Himalayas to Indochina

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-chested tyrant (Taeniotriccus andrei) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Brazil, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J
